theme_archetype.name: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) + Retro-Futurism Terminal Blocks
theme_archetype.rationale: Developer tools and system-level control panels demand authority, clarity, and function-first design. We utilize a stark, objective light mode for the core UI (reducing clinical coldness), juxtaposed with 'Retro-Futurism' dark terminal blocks specifically for generated PowerShell/Bash commands to signal actionable code.

spacing_layout.container: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden bg-background font-body
spacing_layout.sidebar: w-72 lg:w-80 border-r border-border bg-surface flex-shrink-0 h-full hidden md:flex flex-col
spacing_layout.header: h-16 border-b border-border bg-surface/50 backdrop-blur-md flex items-center justify-between px-6 z-10
spacing_layout.chat_area: flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 md:p-8 space-y-8 pb-40 scroll-smooth
spacing_layout.floating_bar_container: absolute bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[calc(100%-2rem)] max-w-2xl z-50
spacing_layout.padding_scale: Use generous p-6 or p-8 inside cards to avoid text collision with borders.

surfaces.floating_bar: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/75 border border-black/10 shadow-[0_16px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] rounded-2xl flex items-center p-2 gap-2 transition-all
surfaces.terminal_block: bg-terminal-background border border-terminal-border rounded-xl shadow-2xl overflow-hidden my-4 relative group
surfaces.terminal_header: bg-white/10 px-4 py-2 flex justify-between items-center border-b border-white/10 text-xs text-white/50 font-mono
surfaces.chat_bubble_user: bg-gray-100 text-text_primary rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-5 py-3.5 max-w-[80%] shadow-sm border border-black/5 ml-auto
surfaces.chat_bubble_ai: bg-surface border border-border shadow-sm rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-5 py-4 max-w-[85%]

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary_foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-lg px-5 py-2.5 font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95 text-sm
buttons.floating_icon: h-12 w-12 rounded-xl flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-transparent hover:bg-black/5 text-text_secondary transition-all data-[active=true]:bg-black/10 data-[active=true]:text-primary data-[active=true]:shadow-inner
buttons.copy: absolute top-2 right-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white rounded p-1.5

inputs.chat: flex-1 bg-transparent border-none focus:ring-0 text-base placeholder:text-gray-400 py-3 px-4 outline-none font-body

components.select: Use Shadcn Select for Voice Presets. Customize to have border-black/10, square-ish radius (rounded-md), and Chivo font.
components.switch: Use Shadcn Switch for Security Filter toggle. Active state should be pure black (bg-primary).

motion.chat_entrance: framer-motion: initial={opacity: 0, y: 15} animate={opacity: 1, y: 0} transition={duration: 0.4, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1]}
motion.floating_bar: framer-motion: initial={y: 50, opacity: 0} animate={y: 0, opacity: 1} transition={type: 'spring', damping: 20, stiffness: 300}

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. PRE-REQUISITES: Ensure 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' are loaded via Google Fonts in index.html or layout.
2. LAYOUT: Implement a 'Control Room' grid layout. A fixed left sidebar (hidden on mobile, width w-80) for Settings, Voice Presets, and Command Templates. The right side is the main Chat Area.

3. FLOATING ACTION BAR: The core input method is a sticky, glassmorphic floating bar at the bottom (`surfaces.floating_bar`). It must contain the text input and the four critical floating buttons (Mic, Screen, A, I). Use `data-[active=true]` styling for active toggles.

4. COMMAND GENERATOR: When Aradhya AI returns a PowerShell/Bash/CMD script, render it inside the `surfaces.terminal_block`. It must be pure black (#000000) with JetBrains Mono green text (#4ADE80) to contrast sharply against the light theme. Include a copy button.
5. KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS: Render keyboard shortcuts using `<kbd>` tags formatted cleanly (e.g., border, shadow-sm, text-xs, rounded-md, bg-gray-50, px-1.5, py-0.5) inside the sidebar or header.
6. VOICE PRESETS: Place the Female/Baby voice selector in the sidebar or top header using a custom Shadcn Select.
7. SECURITY FILTER: Include a toggle switch for 'Web Search Security Filter'. When the Internet ('I') button in the floating bar is active, a small indicator should show if the filter is on.

8. ACCESSIBILITY & TESTING: Every interactive element MUST include a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid='mic-toggle-button'`, `data-testid='copy-command-button'`).
